availability_zones.description: A list of availability zones where the orderable DB instance is available.

engine_version.description: The version of the database engine for the orderable DB instance.

id.description: The identifier of the orderable DB instance.

instance_class.description: The class type of the orderable DB instance, indicating the instance's computing power and size.

vpc.description: A boolean indicating whether the orderable DB instance is in a Virtual Private Cloud (VPC).
